caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with bold text that reads "I NEVER DO SHIT TWICE." The setting appears to be a studio within a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man seems engaged in conversation, possibly sharing insights or stories related to business or life experiences. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional discussion aimed at providing valuable content to the audience.
